sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93863" key="shrikodiasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σηρῐκο-διαστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93863.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">silk-weaver</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
